testcase.name: test_fetch_legislation_gov_uk_streams_pdf
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_corpus_law_uk.py:97: in test_fetch_legislation_gov_uk_streams_pdf assert r.status_code == 200, f"expected 200, got {r.status_code} — {r.text[:300] if r.status_code != 200 else ''}" E AssertionError: expected 200, got 502 — {"detail":"Upstream returned 202"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_arxiv_search_still_works
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_corpus_law_uk.py:121: in test_arxiv_search_still_works assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"arXiv upstream error: Client error '429 Unknown Error' for url 'https://export.arxiv.org/api/query?search_query=all%3Atransformer&start=0&max_results=5&sortBy=relevance'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/429"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
